description: This is a test suite for the Modal component in a JavaScript UI library, testing modal behavior, events, API, and integration with jQuery.

classes.name: Modal
classes.description: Main class representing the modal component, with methods for showing, hiding, disposing, and handling modal behavior.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the modal, handling focus, backdrop, and transition effects.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the modal, removing focus trap and backdrop.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up modal instance and event listeners.

methods.name: handleUpdate
methods.description: Updates modal layout, e.g., adjusting dialog on resize.
